market_context: X/Twitter sentiment is mildly bullish on AI and tech with NVDA and META seeing positive mentions amid low VIX. Pre-market futures point to a flat-to-up open with no major negative catalysts. Expected Fed-related commentary is the main event today.

NVDA at 202.78 with strong options flow noted on X for calls. Positive AI news flow continues and 5-day trend supportive. Expect follow-through above 205 by EOD.
TSLA at 406.55 shows short interest signals on X and recent 5-day gain may face profit-taking. No positive catalyst today and broader EV sector quiet.
BTC at 64344 with 5-day +1.2% and crypto Twitter sentiment turning optimistic on ETF inflows. Correlates with risk-on equity tone.
